title: Check Medicare revalidation due dates
description: Enter 1 to 100 valid NPIs. The Actor returns one current public CMS revalidation result per NPI. Invalid check digits are rejected before any paid result is created.

npis.title: NPIs
npis.description: One to 100 unique 10-digit NPIs. Each returned NPI row is one paid result. Example NPIs are included only to demonstrate dated and TBD output.
